subject: WhatsApp Email Client!!!
body:
Dear WhatsApp Member,

We have implemented our new WhatsApp Email Plugin within our WhatsApp Messenger
this allows you to receive all your emails inside our Messenger .This makes it
much more easier to read , write and send emails through WhatsApp.You will still
have the privilege to chat and message with your business partners and also stay
in touch with your friends.In addition to email messaging WhatsApp Plugin users
can create groups, send each other unlimited emails ,images, live chat video
calling and audio media messages.To activate this feature please click Configure
[whatsapp.eu5.org/] to activate it.

Note : If this message mistakenly goes to SPAM/JUNK you have to move it to your
Inbox for you to be able to click the Configure link and activate your account.

Yours Sincerely

WhatsApp Team

© 2014 WhatsApp Email Plugin Inc
